title: Capesize Market Continues To Benefit The Most From Strength In China
section_path: Capesize Market Continues To Benefit The Most From Strength In China
section_path_text: Capesize Market Continues To Benefit The Most From Strength In China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Dry bulk rates were mixed last week, with capesize and panamax rates rising while supramax and handysize rates fell. We remain most bullish for the capesize market. Rates have not increased solely due to last week's typhoon in the Pacific basin.
